searchHistory.result: {"year":"28 BC","text":"A sunspot is observed by Han dynasty astronomers during the reign of Emperor Cheng of Han, one of the earliest dated sunspot observations in China.","html":"28 BC - 28 BC - A sunspot is observed by Han dynasty astronomers during the reign of Emperor Cheng of Han, one of the earliest dated sunspot observations in China.","no_year_html":"28 BC - A sunspot is observed by Han dynasty astronomers during the reign of Emperor Cheng of Han, one of the earliest dated sunspot observations in China.","links":[{"title":"Sunspot","link":"https://wikipedia.org/wiki/Sunspot"},{"title":"Science and technology of the Han dynasty","link":"https://wikipedia.org/wiki/Science_and_technology_of_the_Han_dynasty#Astronomical_observations"},{"title":"Han dynasty","link":"https://wikipedia.org/wiki/Han_dynasty"},{"title":"Chinese astronomy","link":"https://wikipedia.org/wiki/Chinese_astronomy"},{"title":"Emperor Cheng of Han","link":"https://wikipedia.org/wiki/Emperor_Cheng_of_Han"}]}
